objective: Resolve V3.45 data acceptance failure without mutating raw Tushare daily files by quarantining source-side OHLC anomalies and proving the processed scope is clean.
forbidden: Do not edit raw CSV data files.
Do not call Tushare or any other network API.
Do not promote this data to adjusted-return, valuation, or portfolio-backtest use.
acceptance: Every source OHLC anomaly must be row-level identified.
Every source OHLC anomaly must be quarantined from the processed scope.
All non-OHLC V3.45 checks must pass.
V3.44 raw adjustment guard must still pass.
The final manifest must keep model_decision as no_model_promotion.
